class.description: the detected failure class — the difference the founder asked the system to tell apart

endpoint.description: the endpoint name the invoke failed on (never a secret value)

model.description: the model that was asked for, when the endpoint names one

keyRef.description: the auth keyRef involved on an auth failure — the REFERENCE, never the value

serverMessage.description: the server's own error text (e.g. LM Studio's "Model … failed to load"), captured verbatim

hint.description: the one-line "what to do about it" step
